Vendor Reply:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback we do really appreciate this , and I am pleased to hear you found our rates competitive.

While many rates are available online, we aim to add value by supporting you throughout the whole process. This includes managing the application on your behalf, checking lender criteria, and helping to deal with any questions along the way, which can make things feel more straightforward than a purely online approach.

I also wanted to clarify one point you mentioned. Although the lender paid us a fee for arranging the mortgage, this was not added to your mortgage, does not increase the loan, and has no impact on your monthly repayments.
I appreciate your comments and will reflect on them as we continue to improve the experience we offer.

Thank you again for your openness and for choosing us to support you with your mortgage.

What truly impressed me about Rob was his dedication to ensuring I understood every aspect of the process. He patiently took the time to explain various options available to me, clarifying any questions I had along the way. Unlike some advisers who may rush through explanations, Rob's approach was refreshingly thorough, ensuring I felt confident and informed every step of the way.

Instead, Rob empowered me to make informed choices based on his recommendations, providing guidance without any sense of obligation. This created a comfortable and trusting environment, allowing me to make decisions at my own pace.

Overall, I cannot recommend Rob highly enough for anyone seeking financial advice, particularly in the realm of mortgage renewal. Description: Mortgage Service and referral to conveyancing
Review: We had a pathetic experience of services provided by this company. No details were provided for the products available. Mr. Hardik Thakkar with the greed of earning extra income forced us to accept a solicitor referral. He told us that the solicitor we were intending to use was not on the lender’s panel. So, we went with his referral so that we can have a common solicitor for the lender and buyer. Later at a very late stage, we found that the conveyancer who was working for us was also not on the lender’s panel. Broker never bothered us to inform. We have two sets of offer documents with the names of different solicitors. We were forced to pay in excess of £1,500.00 for the lender’s solicitor fees in addition to fees payable to our conveyancer. The demand for these fees came at a very late stage when were hoping to complete the transaction. No quote for the lender’s solicitor was ever discussed. These guys don’t even know the difference between a conveyancer and a solicitor. They confirmed the difference by emailing a query to a conveyancing firm after being asked by us. Mr. Thakkar adds the commission he wants to earn by adding it on top of the conveyancer’s quote. He never informed us about the commission he is intending to earn from a referral. It is all in fine print for us to read. The conveyancer he referred messed up the case and we ended up losing the property. We have taken the conveyancer to Legal Ombudsman. Finance Planning even lied that no commission was received for any referral. They only agreed when we provided them with some evidence from the commission payer.  No action was taken by the compliance team for the complaints raised against the advisor. Appears that everyone is working in a team to cover up for each other.
Product Ref: MORTGAGE SERVICE AND REFERRAL TO CONVEYANCING
